name: Fake IP Rights Registration Advance Fee
description: Scammer posing as talent scout for a streaming platform demands a rights registration fee before licensing payment

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I am a talent scout for a major streaming platform. We want to license your design work for $15,000.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: That sounds great. How do we proceed?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: You need to pay a $300 rights registration fee through media-rights-register.io to protect your IP during the transfer first.

red_flags: Must pay to receive money scheme
